# +1 Chopsticks (加一双筷子)

> China's first home dining marketplace. We connect international travelers with vetted local host families for authentic home-cooked meals in real family homes — not restaurants. Operating in Shanghai, Shenzhen, and Chengdu. From ¥280 per person.

Website: https://plus1chopsticks.com
Contact: foodie@plus1chopsticks.com

## How it works
- Travelers browse host families at https://plus1chopsticks.com/hosts and book a lunch or dinner date online
- Meals take place in the host's own home, typically 2 hours, groups of 1–6 guests
- Hosts are vetted by the +1 Chopsticks team; exact addresses are shared after booking confirmation
- Prices range from ¥280–¥388 per person, paid securely online

## Hosts
- Shanghai: Jiading Ayi (Shanghainese, garden courtyard), Grace (private, solo/business travelers, max 2), Echo (dumpling making), Norika & Steven (northern-southern fusion), Sookie (Cantonese/Chaoshan/fusion), Yiting (Shanghai & Sichuan, handmade ceramics)
- Shenzhen: Chuan (Guangxi-Cantonese-Southeast Asian fusion), Filbert (registered dietician, Hunan-Zhejiang)
- Chengdu: Dragon (mild Sichuan, optional tea ceremony)

## Press
Featured in City News Service (Shanghai Daily affiliate) and World of Chinese.

## Key pages
- Browse hosts: https://plus1chopsticks.com/hosts
- What home dining looks like: https://plus1chopsticks.com/what-home-dining-exp-looks-like-in-china
- Blog: https://plus1chopsticks.com/blog
